{"analysis": "The attack has been implemented in /app/attack.py and verified successfully across 5 random key trials. It recovers key[5] correctly each time in about 0.1 seconds, well under the 30-second limit. The attack uses a deterministic differential characteristic with chosen plaintext difference dPL=0x02000002, dPR=0x82808082, giving a known left-half difference 0x80808080 before the last round. It then brute-forces the 2^16 possible seeds for key[5] and checks the last-round F-function differential equation over 8 chosen-plaintext pairs, returning the unique consistent candidate.",
  "plan": "No further commands are needed. The task is complete.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
